aiml.bar: Strong CS fundamentals, LeetCode hard problems, system design, ML theory
aiml.portfolio_bar: Published papers OR impressive open source contributions OR top Kaggle ranking

backend.bar: Strong algorithms, system design, production experience
backend.portfolio_bar: Backend system handling millions of requests or complex distributed system
backend.interview_format: Phone screening → 2 coding rounds → 1 system design → on-site

frontend.bar: Expert-level CSS, React internals, web fundamentals
frontend.portfolio_bar: High-performance web project, significant UI contribution to open source
frontend.interview_format: Phone → 2 technical rounds → system design → on-site

resume_requirements: Quantified impact, Google-scale numbers preferred, show ownership, metrics-driven
hiring_philosophy: Hire for learning potential and fundamental understanding, not just experience
compensation_expectations: Highly competitive, includes stock and bonus
career_path: IC and management tracks available, rotational programs for newer grads
